name: Aub Group Limited
analysis: AUB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$26.5400. Trade idea: entry A$28.4100, stop A$25.0965, target A$31.2921 (0.87:1) — then trail it.
